app.name: Our Pins
app.filesTooltip: Open shared Google Drive (members can upload)

auth.needInvite: You'll need an invite from Mako to join.
auth.noInviteBody: Our Pins is private and invite-only. Ask Mako or a community admin for an invite link.
auth.linkExpired: Your sign-in link expired or was already used. Enter your email below to get a new one.
auth.signInError: Something went wrong signing you in. Try again with the form below.
auth.privacyNote: Sign-in is only used to confirm your identity. Your email address is visible to community admins only.

invite.expiredBody: This invite link is no longer active. Ask Mako for a new one.

onboarding.title: Let's set you up
onboarding.realNameHelp: Only Mako and admins see this. Optional but appreciated.
onboarding.avatarHelp: Required. Helps people recognise you on the map.
onboarding.bioHelp: Tell the community a little about yourself — where you live, what you do.
onboarding.guidelinesAccept: I agree to the community guidelines

map.title: Map
map.loadError: The map couldn't load. Check your connection and refresh.
map.addPlaceTooltip: Add a place not already on the map

pin.placeErrorBody: Google didn't return details for this spot. Close the sheet and try again.
pin.firstVouchPrompt: Nobody from the community has vouched for this place yet.
pin.vouchPlaceholder: Why do you recommend this to a friend?
pin.pickPlaceError: Pick a place from the search results.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.body: This page doesn’t exist or may have been moved.

board.title: Noticeboard
board.subtitle: Jobs, housing, things for sale, events — anything the community should know.
board.bodyPlaceholder: Say more — include how to reach you.
board.requiredFields: Add a title and details first.
board.empty: Nothing here yet. Share something with the community!

resources.title: Resources
resources.subtitle: How-tos, things to watch, things to read — the community's library.
resources.bodyPlaceholder: The full how-to, or why it's worth a look.
resources.permanentNote: Resources stay up permanently — you can edit or remove yours anytime.
resources.requiredFields: Add a title and details first.
resources.empty: Nothing here yet. Share the first resource!

activity.title: Activity
activity.empty: Nothing yet. Pin a place to get the feed started.

settings.title: Settings
settings.deleteAccountConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete your account? This can't be undone.
settings.deleteAccountExplainer: Your pins and vouches will be retained but anonymised. Your private profile data will be erased.
settings.editProfileHelp: Update your display name, photo, Instagram, or website.

concierge.title: Ask Parea
concierge.subtitle: Answers come only from the community's vouches.
concierge.empty: Ask anything — "Where do I take my parents for 3 days near Tokyo?" — and Parea answers from what the community has vouched for, citing who said it.
concierge.errorBudget: Parea has used up this month's budget. Try again next month.
concierge.errorDaily: You've reached today's question limit. Ask again tomorrow.
concierge.errorNotConfigured: Parea isn't set up yet — ask Mako.
